prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `fafd9572`.
codex_response:
Implemented the `fafd9572` ARC2 package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fafd9572/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fafd9572/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fafd9572/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fafd9572/notes.md). The rule is: a small colored template shape appears as singleton palette cells, and the larger color-`1` region is made of 8-connected copies of that same support shape arranged on a scaled-up copy of the template; each large copy is recolored uniformly from the corresponding palette cell.

I discarded both summary hints. The key mismatch is in train 2: there are `12` four-connected color-`1` fragments but only `6` palette cells, so the real targets are the `6` eight-connected composite shapes, not the smaller fragments. The generator matches the family by explicitly building that self-similar construction with official-style compact shapes and transformed variants. No new primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task fafd9572` passed all 3 official examples, and `python -m arc2.shared.build --task fafd9572 --n-examples 1000` produced [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fafd9572/task.json), [examples](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fafd9572/examples), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fafd9572/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fafd9572/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fafd9572/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fafd9572/previews/preview_03.png).
